# When to Ignore Dashboard ROAS

Dashboard ROAS is useful for operations and dangerous for truth.

## Ignore or distrust dashboard ROAS when

- retargeting dominates,
- branded search dominates,
- customers already knew the brand,
- attribution windows are long,
- conversion tracking changed,
- platform optimization changed,
- low volume creates noise,
- sales cycles are long,
- offline conversion quality is unknown,
- the platform both serves and grades the ads.

Use platform dashboards to steer. Do not use them as the final court of reality.
